---
title: "Selected Works"
subtitle: "A selection of projects, research, and writing across [your fields]."
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-title: "Jump to"
---

::: {.page-intro}
A paragraph about you — what you've built, your background, what you care about.
This is where a few sentences capture the arc of your career.

::: {.awards-row}
[★ Award or Recognition · Year]{.award-chip}
[★ Another Award or Recognition]{.award-chip}
:::
:::

---

## Early Work {#early}

*2005 — 2013 · Employer or Context*

A sentence or two describing this phase of your career — what you were focused on,
who you worked for, what the era produced.

::: {.work-card}
::: {.work-badge}
★ Flagship Project
:::

### Project Name

*Type of Work · Year · Context*

Describe what this project was, what problem it solved, why it mattered.
Be specific — concrete details are more convincing than vague claims.

> "A direct quote from the work, a paper, a talk, or a press mention.
> Quotes add credibility and give the reader a sense of voice." — Source, Year

::: {.work-links}
[Paper](#){.work-link}
[GitHub](#){.work-link}
[Write-up](#){.work-link}
:::
:::

::: {.work-card}
::: {.work-badge}
♦ Notable Work
:::

### Another Project

*Type · Year*

Description of this project. Keep it focused on outcomes and impact rather than
process — what did it enable, what did it discover, who used it?

::: {.work-links}
[Link](#){.work-link}
:::
:::

---

## Main Area of Work {#main}

*2014 — 2020 · Employer or Context*

Description of this phase. What was the focus? What did you build or contribute?

::: {.work-card}
::: {.work-badge}
★ Flagship Project
:::

### Major Project Name

*Tool / Framework / Research · Year · 1,000+ stars*

Detailed description of the project. What was novel about it? What technique or
approach did it use? What was the reception?

> "A representative quote from the work or a description of the key contribution." — Source

::: {.work-links}
[GitHub](#){.work-link}
[Paper](#){.work-link}
[Talk](#){.work-link}
:::
:::

---

## Recent Work {#recent}

*2021 — Present*

What are you working on now? What's the current focus?

::: {.work-card}
::: {.work-badge}
★ Current Project
:::

### Current Main Project

*Research / Tool / Framework · 2023–Present · arXiv Paper*

What is this? What problem does it solve? What makes it different from existing approaches?
Include quantitative results if you have them.

> "A key insight or finding from the work." — Source, Year

::: {.work-links}
[GitHub](#){.work-link}
[Paper](#){.work-link}
:::
:::

---

## Writings {#writings}

### Topic Area One

| Year | Title |
|------|-------|
| 2025 | [Title of an Article or Post](#) |
| 2024 | [Another Article](#) |
| 2023 | [An Older Post](#) |

### Topic Area Two

| Year | Title |
|------|-------|
| 2026 | [Recent Piece](#) |
| 2025 | [Another Piece](#) |
